channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Litter everywhere, 26th April
item.description:
Good day. I've immigrated from South Africa. One of the things I was looking forward to moving to England was cleaner streets. There is trash everywhere along the main street by plumbstead road, the bus stops and towards the train station. There is no pride for the neighbourhood. Walking home I must navigate through papers and cans. Why is this being allowed? I'd happily organise a cleanup crew and do a neighbourhood cleanup if you could put me in touch with the correct people please? This is just not what I would expect from 'the best city in the world' in a 1st world country. It's heartbreaking we shouldn't live like this.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Plumstead Road, Woolwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Cooker dumped on the pavement, 26th April
item.description:
Been there a couple of days
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Swingate Lane, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

Fly tipping

item.title: Graffiti on cabinet, 26th April
item.description:
Please remove

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 10, Cutcombe Road, Loughborough Junction, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Both Black bins and recycling bins are overflowing, 26th April
item.description:
The allocated black and recycling bins for this development are once again completely overflowing, resulting in rubbish being left on the floor and items being piled onto the bins.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Tryon Crescent, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Blocked sewage drainage now overflowing onto pavement, 26th April
item.description:
There is bad smelling water pooling outside Saigon House on Homerton High Street near Adonis shop. This is running over the pavement and into the road, and pools in the road when there is high rainfall. Looks like the source is raw sewage from property.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Homerton High Street, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: The blocked rubbish chute on the first floor at the block housing flats 114 to 128 Ravens Way London SE12 8EZ poses a serious health hazard to all residents. Its door cannot close, allowing flies to spread, foul odors to escape, and potentially maggots to fall into communal areas. Immediate action is required to clear the chute and restore safe waste disposal., 26th April
item.description:
The blocked rubbish chute on the first floor at the block housing flats 114 to 128 Ravens Way London SE12 8EZ poses a serious health hazard to all residents. Its door cannot close, allowing flies to spread, foul odors to escape, and potentially maggots to fall into communal areas. Immediate action is required to clear the chute and restore safe waste disposal.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Ravens Way, Eltham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Clothes pulled out and scattered on pavement, 26th April
item.description:
3 people pulling out clothes from recycling bin, leaving mounds of clothes dumped on pavement. Rubbish bins overflowing and dumped rubbish bags torn. Repeat issue
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 210, Venner Road, Penge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bridge opposite queens park station, 26th April
item.description:
Street litter not swept

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Salusbury Road, London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Street cleaning - Grass verges / Shrub beds - Littering

item.title: Graffiti on phone box, 26th April
item.description:
Offensive graffiti on phone box on Prince Rupert road/Admiral Seymour Road

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Admiral Seymour Road, Eltham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: The skip o have shown has cleared most of the problem. A neighbour at no 10 has been using the alley for many months to dump his rubbish & only clears it when asked. Someone else has obviously seen him doing this & has added larger household items., 26th April
item.description:
Problems are... 1. Fire risk 2. Vermin 3. Lack of access The alley has a locked security gate on Glendale Road, but houses on Battle Rd have access & there is an adjoining alley to the next road. This has been happening now for at least a year. No 10 is the main culprit. The lack of access has caused me many problems when I have had a work done. Otherwise it's unsightly, unsafe & a massive health & safety issue.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Glendale Road, Northumberland Heath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Broken fence - contractors came to fix it but left it half done, 26th April
item.description:
There is a broken fence on Admiral Seymour Road. Contractors came to fix it several weeks ago and left if half-done, saying they needed more wood. They haven’t returned, and it has been at least 2 months. Please fix, thanks

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Admiral Seymour Road, Eltham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Very loose and noisy manholes outside store on Ken High St, 26th April
item.description:
Look manholes - been like this for few ages now

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 1, Abingdon Road, Kensington, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 2 abandoned cars, 26th April
item.description:
These cars have been left for more than 6 months They are an eyesore and are occupying valuable parking space

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Camberwell New Road, Oval, Greater London

item.title: Blocked pavement, 26th April
item.description:
Bins frequently blocking pavement. Ongoing issue.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Christchurch Way, Greenwich

item.title: Abondoned untaxed vehicle, 26th April
item.description:
The vehicle has been parked on the street and not moved for at least 7 weeks and it’s not taxed either

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 90, Corbylands Road, Longlands, Sidcup, Greater London

item.title: Rusted pole close to collapse, 26th April
item.description:
White pole with no waiting sign has rusted through at base and is close to collapse.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Shooters Hill, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Glass debris from a smashed window, 26th April
item.description:
I reported this before when it was on the pavement but nothing has been done, as you can see there is smashed glass gathered on the edge of the road/pavement from an incident. There are so many families and children that walk and play around here. Please get this sorted asap

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Hillcrest Road, Sundridge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Ru bishop blocking the pavement, more rubbish being added by passers by, 26th April
item.description:
This has been reported before, the rubbish belongs to 31 Cambridge Avenue Welling, but is on the pavement on Cumberland Avenue, it has been there for 4 months

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Cumberland Avenue, Falconwood, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
